meaning: 克罗伊登[英国英格兰东南部城市](在大伦敦郡的南部)
examples: Welcome aboard Southeast Service to Red Hill, East Croydon and Victoria.
Nobby and I set out for Croydon.
The duke of croydon pored over an opened esso road map .
Birmingham's Midland Metro, the Manchester Metrolink and the Croydon Tramlink still make a loss.
He suggested a possible cultural exchange "to go down and understand the delights of Croydon".
